summary: Backend + Frontend testing for the new offboarding/exit_date feature. 25/25 backend tests PASS (9 new offboarding tests + 16 regression tests). 9/9 frontend UI test cases PASS on mobile viewport (390x844). Verified end-to-end: super_admin sets exit_date -> /auth/me returns offboarded=true + company_name -> /(tabs) guard + landing guard redirect to /offboarded -> exact message 'You are no longer to use this app due to you have left company (UITEST_Co_32e67e).' rendered with testID offboarded-message -> Sign out clears llc_session_token in localStorage and returns to landing screen. Also verified: role field is optional in RoleUpdate, exit_date="" clears the field, company_admin can set exit_date for own-company employees, cross-company attempt returns 403, company_admin cannot change role/company_id (silently ignored), future exit_date does NOT offboard, super_admin auto-promoted on OTP login for sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com. Admin editor modal now shows testID exit-date-input plus exit-date-clear when populated. Regression: normal employee lands on (tabs) with tab-punch visible, landing exposes both google-login-button and otp-login-button.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warns: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow"' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Non-blocking but should be cleaned up when migrating to RN 0.75+ for web. Sources: styles using shadow.* in landing/offboarded/admin screens.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate deprecated `shadow*` style props to `boxShadow` and `props.pointerEvents` to `style.pointerEvents` to silence RN Web console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1356 lines (grew again). Still exceeds the 700-line guideline; consider splitting into routers (auth, otp, company, admin, attendance, leaves, payroll, tickets, notifications).

PATCH /api/admin/user-role silently ignores `role` and `company_id` when the caller is company_admin (server.py:1273-1278). That is safe, but returning a 403 or a warning would give clearer feedback to the client. Current behaviour tested & documented.
offboarded flag comparison uses lexicographic string compare on ISO YYYY-MM-DD (server.py:404) which is correct because ISO dates sort lexicographically. Good.
exit_date is stored as-is (string) but the JSON body's empty string is correctly coerced to None in the DB (server.py:1288-1291). Verified via GET /admin/employees round-trip.
Late imports of random and hashlib inside server.py (~line 430-431) still present from prior iteration — move to top-of-file.
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates fresh companies (UITEST_Co_* / TEST_Co_*) and employees (qa_emp_*, ui_emp_*, qa_ca_*) via OTP dev-mode. Company-admin test users promoted via super_admin. Data is left in DB (no cleanup) — consider a teardown fixture in a future pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use BASE URL from /app/frontend/.env EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Run tests with: EXPO_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Frontend token key in localStorage is 'llc_session_token'. Offboarded screen route is /offboarded with testIDs offboarded-screen / offboarded-message / offboarded-signout. Admin editor exit input testIDs: exit-date-input, exit-date-clear.
rca_of_issue: N/A — feature works as specified. Offboarding is enforced at two levels: (1) landing /app/frontend/app/index.tsx redirects offboarded users to /offboarded before hitting (tabs); (2) /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx also redirects if user tries to deep-link to a tab. Backend derives `offboarded` from exit_date via lex compare against today (UTC, YYYY-MM-DD) and joins company_name from the companies collection in _enrich_user_with_company().
